title: Rentheannun
description: Ren brings a varied set of piano-based melodies and guitar driven songs. Ren's performances are known for raw emotion and create a powerful connection with the audience exploring themes of identity, sexuality, heartbreak, loss and life's fragility. Expect your soul to be stirred in the beautiful and transforming surroundings of The Church of the Annunciation in Hanover. Plus very special guests - Jay Cons - extraordinary guitarist and musician with flare, complexity and strength. Julian Stevens - Brighton based trans poet, dancer and artist. Julian’s writing involves whimsical journaling, observational lists and poetic streams of consciousness. @julians.corner/ [email protected]
content_warnings: Songs may contain references to mental illness, childhood trauma, aggression and suicide
